No purchase is required to participate -- gathering and killing monsters is the entire earn loop.

title: Crazy Eggs
summary: Smash 4 eggs using Hammers (min 58 total) for gems/stamina/refining stones; a 5th egg auto-unlocks.
content: Event currency is Hammers (earned via normal play, see 'How to get Hammer efficiently'); each of 4 eggs needs at least 2 smashes to fully activate: Princess Lucy 3 hammers, James Bowie 6, Isabella I 8, Minamoto no Yoshitsune 12 -- minimum 58 hammers to activate all 4 (2x(3+6+8+12)), ~70 hammers to reliably clear all with bad luck. Activating all 4 auto-triggers a bonus 5th Caesar Egg. Each smash gives 4 of 5 possible rewards at random per egg. Priority if hammers are scarce: Yoshitsune egg for Gems (4,000) and Speedup for Training; Bowie egg for Stamina (100) and Refining Stone (180); Isabella egg for Arrest Warrant (6) and Gold. Fully clearing all eggs nets roughly 106h+40m general Speed Up, 196h Training speedup, 84h Healing speedup, plus ~380K Monarch EXP and ~385K General EXP combined. Good target for a bot to dump accumulated hammers into for free gems/stamina/speedups.

title: Drop Rate of Historic General at Tavern (In-game displayed values & Test results)
summary: Tavern level directly sets historic-general odds; free daily tavern check is worth doing, Lv24+ best for gem-refresh.
content: Tavern level 10 or below never yields historic generals (only Common/Uncommon). Historic-general (Legendary/Epic) odds rise with tavern level; per-6-slot-refresh chance (official in-game values, confirmed close to real test data): at Lv30, ~7.32% for a Legendary historic and ~2.51% for an Epic historic; at Lv37 (max tested), ~9.76%/3.38%. Real mass-refresh test at Lv30 (3,400 refreshes/170,000 gems) measured ~2.2-2.5% gold-historic rate per refresh, matching in-game figures within margin of error, though probability appeared to dip slightly the more refreshes were done in one sitting and certain generals clustered in bursts. Guidance: raise Tavern to at least Lv24+ before spending gems seriously chasing historic generals; even free/no-cost natural refreshes (checking tavern periodically) can yield a historic general (several users report free pulls at Lv10-20); cap serious gem-refresh sessions at ~100/day and try a different day if unlucky rather than over-spending in one sitting.

title: Alliance Competition Event
summary: ~10-day alliance event: score via building, gathering, killing bosses, healing/power, and speedups; capped challenges.
content: Event runs ~10 days. Personal (monarch) score sums into an alliance score; alliance rank tier (Novice/Junior/Elite/Legendary/Epic) sets the score needed for max personal reward (2,600-5,200) and the number of free quest challenges (17 free at Elite, +5 more purchasable up to 18,500 gems). Keep only quests scoring 140+ (170+ at Elite/above); R4/R5 should delete low-value quests since challenge slots are capped and non-refundable once started. High-value quests matching a bot's normal actions (50-240 pts each): Cultivate Generals 500x=240; Consume Runestones 1.5K=240; Increase Power 25M=240 (heal wounded troops via battle+speedups); Gather RSS outside city 54M one type=240; Kill Boss Monsters 50x=170 and Kill Lv14+ Boss 5x=170 (easy via alliance rallies); Stamina 2K=170; Offer at Temple/Shrine 80x=240 (use saved tribute); Wheel of Fortune 360 spins=170. Barbarian-castle, battlefield/CoC, and subordinate-city attacks do NOT count toward kill/attack quests. Rewards: generals redemption item at max personal score, plus alliance-rank-scaled rewards.

title: When is Server Merges ? & What happens?
summary: Irregular (~1-2x/year) merges, 10-day advance notice; personal assets kept but rankings/relics/bookmarks reset.
content: Server merges happen irregularly at Evony's discretion (roughly once or twice a year historically), based on server environment, active player count, and availability of a matching server; notification email goes out ~10 days before merge, maintenance details the day before, merge completes within a few hours of maintenance. Effects for bot planning: personal data is preserved (building levels, VIP level, gems, gold, resources, sub cities, generals, troops, items); alliance remains but alliance buildings are removed (rebuild is free if already built pre-merge); players are randomly teleported onto the new shared map; all resource tiles and monsters reset and relics are removed; field troops auto-return to city; SvS/Battlefield rankings, Kings/Titles, and Monarch Competition all reset (last-stage rewards still sent; Throne War restarts after 24h); map bookmarks are deleted; duplicate names get numbered. A bot should re-scout resource tiles/relics and re-bookmark targets right after any merge.

title: Server Time vs Country Time Table (US, UK, RU, JP)
summary: Server time runs on UTC; daily reset is at server 0:00, shifting by 1 hour locally under non-DST winter time.
content: Evony server time is UTC-based (displayed at the top of the options screen). Conversion table given for USA Los Angeles (PDT UTC-7 / PST UTC-8), USA New York (EDT UTC-4 / EST UTC-5), UK (BST UTC+1 summer / GMT UTC+0 winter), Russia Moscow (MSK UTC+3 year-round), and Japan (JST UTC+9 year-round, no DST). During DST changeover (2nd Sunday March - 1st Sunday November per US convention), the daily in-game reset (tied to server midnight) effectively shifts by 1 hour in local clock time for countries/regions that do not observe daylight saving. SvS (Server vs Server) event timing does NOT change with DST; Kill Event (KE) timing DOES change with DST. Useful for a bot scheduling gathering/build/kill actions around fixed server-time daily resets and event windows regardless of the operator's local timezone.

title: Rally Spot
summary: Rally Spot sets base March Size and launches/joins rallies; buildable from Keep 1, a top-2 beginner priority alongside Academy; duty slot Lv35.
content: The Rally Spot is the master March-Size building and the launch/join point for rallies. Buildable from Keep 1 (one level per Keep level), so it can be pushed early; the Construction guide names Academy + Rally Spot as the two top-priority buildings to upgrade after each Keep-up. Each Rally Spot level raises the base March Size (Lv1 ~780-800 troops scaling up to ~860,000 by Lv45); total march size = this base multiplied/added by % and flat buffs from research, VIP, rank, gear, generals (see how-to-increase-march-size). From Lv26 upward the upgrade also requires Army Camp at the same level (dual gate). Larger Rally Spot = bigger single march = faster resource gathering and stronger rally/monster hits. Duty Officer slot unlocks at Rally Spot Lv35 and adds March Size (up to +30% / +70,000; ideal Toyotomi Hideyoshi or Zhang Liang). No core function is lost while the Rally Spot itself upgrades. Priority for an economy bot: keep Rally Spot near Keep level to maximize gather throughput and rally capacity.
